metadata.description: Marketplace for plugins that bring external AI models to Claude Code. Current plugins: GLM (z.ai; model id from settings.glm.json), Gemini (Google), opencode (default/last-used model), pi (pi coding agent), MiniMax-M3 (self-hosted via bunker-llm).

plugins.name: glm
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to z.ai's GLM model (model id from ~/.claude/settings.glm.json) via claude -p subprocess.

plugins.name: gemini
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to Google's Gemini model via gemini CLI subprocess.

plugins.name: opencode
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to opencode (using its default/last-used model) via the opencode run CLI.

plugins.name: pi
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to the pi coding agent (using its default/configured model) via the pi -p CLI.

plugins.name: minimax-m3
plugins.description: Delegate tasks to the self-hosted MiniMax-M3 model via the bunker-llm Anthropic-compatible proxy.
